name: Grim Reaper
ability: The 1st time you die at night (not to the Grim Reaper), you may choose an alive player to die instead. The Demon, if chosen, doesn't die.
flavor: You can run, you can hide, but the Reaper comes for all.
otherNightReminder: When players died for the 1st time tonight, they were woken & shown the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & Grim Reaper tokens. Each might have chosen a player. If you haven't done this yet, do so now. ?:reminder:s (v2.0)

jinxes.reason: The Lleech host can't die to the Grim Reaper.
